---
title: probe
format: html
---

Minimal reproduction of docs/guide/export.qmd chunk-2 with inline timing,
for the perf-probe workflow. Delete with perf-probe.yaml once diagnosed.

```{r}
t0 <- Sys.time()
library(tabviz); library(dplyr)
cat("PROBE chunk libs:", round(as.numeric(Sys.time()-t0, units="secs"), 2), "s\n")
```

```{r}
t0 <- Sys.time()
data(glp1_trials)
p <- glp1_trials |>
  filter(row_type == "data", group == "Main Trials") |>
  head(5) |>
  tabviz(
    label = "study",
    columns = list(
      col_text("drug", "Drug"),
      viz_forest(point = "hr", lower = "lower", upper = "upper",
                 scale = "log", null_value = 1, width = 180),
      col_interval("hr", "lower", "upper", header = "HR (95% CI)")
    ),
    theme = web_theme_jama(),
    title = "GLP-1 Agonist Cardiovascular Outcomes"
  )
cat("PROBE chunk tabviz():", round(as.numeric(Sys.time()-t0, units="secs"), 2), "s\n")
t0 <- Sys.time()
save_plot(p, "forest_example.svg", width = 700)
cat("PROBE chunk save_plot:", round(as.numeric(Sys.time()-t0, units="secs"), 2), "s\n")
```
